title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXVIII. Proverbs.
content:
Bounce Buckram, velvet's dear;
        Christmas comes but once a year.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LXXXVIII. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
